title: the end is near
wikitext:
[]: the end is near Post by mote » Tue May 11, 2010 11:35 pm Santiago of Chile , last afternoon: more: [url]http://www.radiobiobio.cl/2010/05/11/curioso-fenomeno-meteorologico-sobre-los-cielos-de-santiago/[/url]

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Tue May 11, 2010 11:45 pm OH SHI-

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 11, 2010 11:47 pm That's pretty badass. What is it, really?

[]: Post by Legendary » Tue May 11, 2010 11:51 pm One pic just shows a contrail. It's just shiny for some reason.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed May 12, 2010 5:15 am Damn you Anno, damn you...

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Wed May 12, 2010 1:33 pm I never dreamed the end of the world would begin in Chile.

[]: supposing this is something 2012-ish related!111 Post by the_seventh_child » Wed May 12, 2010 2:25 pm Shit, that means we won;t be able to see Rebuild 4.0 right. Damn.

[]: Post by DevRei17 » Wed May 12, 2010 3:55 pm It was nice knowing all of you.

[]: Post by AchtungAffen » Wed May 12, 2010 5:01 pm It's the trail of a plane, those who do forms in the sky with smoke and shit. Yet, it looks very much Eva. Still, the Russian version was even more frightening.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Thu May 13, 2010 2:05 pm *Anno does the Gendo pose* "Just as planned."

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu May 13, 2010 6:15 pm obilgatory, sorry nice pics of contrails there

[]: Post by tomrule123 » Thu May 13, 2010 8:12 pm No. This can't be true. I WANT TO LIVE LONGER! WHY?! WHY?! WHY?! (Well, looks like SEELE won't keep quiet about this.)

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Fri May 14, 2010 3:53 pm Seele will fail. Second Impact has yet to occur.
